narrative_beat: Wide frontal de profeta medieval estilo Joao em Patmos, bracos abertos, manto carmesim, olhos fechados em oracao, fundo P&B tempestuoso

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a medieval prophet figure in the style of John of Patmos, standing with both arms outstretched wide, wearing a flowing crimson and gold embroidered robe with ornate medieval patterns, eyes closed in fervent prayer, long grey beard, head slightly tilted back, occupying 60% of the frame
subject.focal_point: the outstretched arms and closed eyes in prayer
subject.secondary: golden aureola behind the prophet's head, floating crimson fabric caught in wind

environment.location: a rocky cliff edge overlooking the world

composition.foreground: prophet in vivid crimson, gold, and ochre dominating center frame
composition.midground: rocky cliff edge with floating embers
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white tempestuous sky with lightning and dark clouds

lighting.key_light: divine light from directly above, illuminating the prophet's face and robes
lighting.fill_light: lightning flashes from the storm behind
lighting.rim_light: gold edge on outstretched arms and robe hem
lighting.shadow_quality: deep dramatic shadows beneath the prophet, long shadow on cliff

style.post_processing: halation around divine light, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, robe fabric weave visible, beard hair detail, floating orange embers dense around figure

mood.emotion: prophetic climax, the confession is complete, the truth proclaimed

symbolism.primary: John of Patmos as the original whistleblower — they admitted everything
symbolism.secondary: outstretched arms as both surrender and proclamation

negative_as_positive: anonymous prophetic figure with stylized medieval features, no identifiable real person
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated storm background, vivid crimson and gold foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
